channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: DOJ says ransomware gang tapped into Russian government databases
item.description: U.S. prosecutors said a ransomware gang fueled Russian government corruption, and allowed the gang's leaders to avoid paying taxes and dodge the country's military draft.

item.title: Anthropic is doubling Claude Code rate limits after deal with SpaceX
item.description: The company is also interested in SpaceX's planned orbital data centers.

item.title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
item.description: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.

item.title: What we’re hearing about the new homepage
item.description: We’ve been reading your feedback on the new homepage. All of it. The kind and encouraging comments, the brutal ones, the “actually this rules,” the “please undo this immediately,” the bug reports, the feature ideas, and yes, the eternal request for dark mode. We appreciate it. A lot of you took the time to share […]

item.title: Using AI for Just 10 Minutes Might Make You Lazy and Dumb, Study Shows
item.description: New research suggests that reliance on AI assistants can have a negative impact on people’s ability to think and problem solve.

item.title: Apple removes more Mac mini and Mac Studio models from sale, as CEO Tim Cook warns it 'may take several months to reach supply demand balance'
item.description: Apple is taking more Mac mini and Mac Studio models off the shelves to try and weather the memory shortage.

item.title: Mira Murati tells the court that she couldn’t trust Sam Altman’s words
item.description: Mira Murati, OpenAI's former CTO, has testified under oath that CEO Sam Altman lied to her about the safety standards for a new AI model. In a video deposition shown during the ongoing Musk v. Altman trial on Wednesday, Murati said Altman falsely stated that OpenAI's legal department determined a new AI model did not […]

item.title: The Garmin Fenix 7 Pro got a huge 4.5-star recommendation from us — and it can be snapped up for just £400 at Go Outdoors and Decathlon right now
item.description: It's an older watch, but this 4.5-star outdoor watch powerhouse is at better than half price right now.

item.title: Mexico City Is Sinking. A Powerful NASA Satellite Just Revealed How Fast
item.description: A new NASA map shows how the sinking of Mexico City is uneven, with areas registering up to 2 centimeters per month.

item.title: The 44 best last-minute Mother’s Day gift ideas for 2026
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. This Sunday, Mother's Day, is an opportunity to return the favor, so we've rounded up practical gadgets and little luxuries that can lighten her load. This year's picks are designed to […]

item.title: Ted Turner, the founder of CNN, dies at 87
item.description: Turner’s signature achievement was creating the Cable News Network, the first 24-hour, all-news television network in 1980. Ted Turner, a brash television pioneer who raced yachts, owned huge chunks of the American West and transformed the news business by launching CNN and introducing the 24-hour cable news cycle, died Wednesday. He was 87.

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | Anthropic va utiliser des centres de données SpaceX
item.description: Anthropic a annoncé mercredi un partenariat avec SpaceX, la société spatiale d’Elon Musk, pour utiliser l’intégralité de la capacité de calcul de son centre de données Colossus One, dédié jusqu’ici à l’intelligence artificielle (IA) du milliardaire américain.

item.title: Researcher reveals official White House app is one command away from tracking your precise location every 4.5 minutes – app can also inject code to dodge cookie consent, GDPR banners, and paywalls
item.description: White House app contains code to hide cookie options, GDPR banners, and paywalls - and collects extensive user data

item.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
item.description: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.

item.title: Google just bought a stake in the maker of Eve Online to train its AI models
item.description: DeepMind will research player behavior in the space-based RPG.

item.title: Here’s what Microsoft is offering long-serving employees to voluntarily retire
item.description: Microsoft revealed last month that it's planning to offer long-serving employees in the US the ability to voluntarily retire. While the terms of the buyout were supposed to be announced to employees tomorrow, sources at Microsoft tell me the company has posted them on its internal HR website a little earlier than expected. US employees […]

item.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
item.description: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: 23 top tech offers I'd buy from the latest Currys Epic Deals sale — get up to 40% off Apple, Ninja, Garmin, Dyson, and more
item.description: The latest Currys Epic Deals sale is still live at the retailer this week, so I've taken a look through and picked out the 23 top tech deals that I think are worth your attention.

item.title: Maddies Secret trailer reveals John Early as youve never seen him before
item.description: Kate Berlant reteams with John Early for "Maddie's Secret," a sensationally offbeat comedy.

item.title: MindsEye developer Build a Rocket Boy has reportedly laid off even more staff
item.description: Around 170 roles are said to be affected.

item.title: ‘Paper slows us down; it gives us room to think like humans’: reMarkable’s R&D team on ‘protecting the human advantage’ in the workplace and why now is the right time for its affordable Paper Pure tablet
item.description: We speak to reMarkable’s R&D team about its new affordable tablet, the reMarkable Paper Pure, and its place in the increasingly AI-driven workplace.

item.title: ‘He put me in harm’s way’: Ken Griffin responds to Mamdani’s viral video of his $239 million NYC penthouse
item.description: The billionaire Citadel chief said he will invest more in Miami after the New York mayor promoted a pied-à-terre tax outside his property. Last month, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani celebrated Tax Day by making good on a campaign promise. “When I ran for mayor, I said I was going to tax the rich,” Mamdani said in a viral video posted to social media. “Today, we’re taxing the rich.”...

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs. PSG online for free
item.description: How to watch Champions League for free. Live stream Bayern Munich vs. PSG in the Champions League for free.

item.title: Score up to 64% off at EcoFlow and snag free solar panels with your purchase.
item.description: Between May 6 and May 17, you can score up to 64% off at EcoFlow and snag free solar panels with your purchase.

item.title: Snag a pair of Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones for $50 off
item.description: As of May 6, get a pair of Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones for $50 off.

item.title: I Am Begging AI Companies to Stop Naming Features After Human Processes
item.description: Anthropic announced “dreaming” for AI agents to sort through “memories” at its developer conference. Can we not?

item.title: Buy a $300 Delta gift card and get a free $20 Starbucks gift card
item.description: Buy a Delta gift card worth $300 or more and get a free $20 Starbucks gift card.

item.title: Get a free Samsung Galaxy S26 from T-Mobile without trading in your old phone
item.description: Get a free Samsung Galaxy S26 (256GB) from T-Mobile when signing up for an Experience Beyond plan for 24 months. Existing Go5G Plus members also qualify for the free S26.

item.title: How a Texas vegan cheese-maker used Claude and Manus to fight back against a big shipping company
item.description: Rebel Cheese built and used AI tools to claw back thousands of dollars in overcharges from a large shipping carrier. AI isn’t all about automating core business functions at Fortune 500 companies. Small and medium-sized businesses can also use AI to optimize, economize, and in some cases compete more effectively against much larger rivals.

item.title: I searched Amazon’s entire Mother’s Day sale — these are the 12 deals worth buying from Ninja, Dyson, KitchenAid, and other brands
item.description: I've looked through the retailer's entire Mother's Day sale to find deals from Dyson, Kitchenaid, and other leading brands.

item.title: Native Instruments Komplete 26 adds weird new synths and experimental piano sounds
item.description: The latest version of Native Instruments' Komplete music production bundle is here with 62 new additions, including the wonderfully weird Absynth 6. Komplete 26 comes in several flavors, starting with three $99 Select bundles: Beats, Band, and Electronic. Prices jump pretty steeply from there, with Standard costing $549, Ultimate costing $1,249, and the Collector's Edition […]...

item.title: What could go wrong? A fully electronic braking system is being built into a car for the first time
item.description: A fully electronic braking system is being built into a car for the first time — are we sure removing hydraulic brakes is a good idea?

item.title: Experts warn Microsoft Phone Link tool exploited by 'unknown threat' to steal SMS and OTP info
item.description: A known RAT was given new capabilities in order to exfiltrate 2FA codes and more.

item.title: Plus fort que les heures creuses ? La nouvelle méthode d’EDF testée grâce au compteur Linky
item.description: EDF lance une expérimentation grandeur nature. 6 600 foyers tirés au sort vont tester de nouvelles grilles tarifaires variables, dans le but de mesurer leur capacité à adapter leur consommation au prix de l'électricité.

item.title: Nintendo announces a Switch 2 bundle with Pokémon Pokopia, but theres a catch
item.description: Nintendo announced a Switch 2 + "Pokémon Pokopia" bundle this week, but it's only available in Australia and New Zealand.

item.title: The best beauty tech you can still grab in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: If you’re looking to indulge mom this Mother’s Day, a gift that makes her feel a little more taken care of is a good place to start. Fortunately, if you’re looking for something to make her feel pampered, we know a thing or two about beauty tech, which can deliver on that front. Some of […]

item.title: Which housing markets have the most—and least—mortgage distress right now?
item.description: ResiClub’s new housing distress calculation includes mortgages that are 30 to 89 days past due, 90 to 180 days past due, in foreclosure, or in forbearance. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Apple AirPods Pro 3, MacBook Pro 14 M5 et Xgimi Elfin Flip Plus : les promos incontournables du jour
item.description: Ce mercredi 6 mai 2026 s’annonce riche en bonnes affaires tech.

item.title: This robotic pool vacuum is basically a Roomba that can swim, and it’s $449 off today
item.description: As of May 6, you can get the Beatbot AquaSense 2 for $849 at Amazon, down from $1,298. That's a 35% discount or $449 savings.

item.title: What WNBA players have in the league’s 30th season
item.description: Players have something new: stability. As we gear up for the drama and excitement of the 30th WNBA season, it’s hard to believe that two months ago we were in limbo. Prolonged collective bargaining agreement (CBA) negotiations between the league and the players’ association left us all wondering if the season would even happen. Then came resolution, and a massive step forward for the players....
